DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NORMAN CHARLES CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MEGAL YORK TO ATTEND DEPOSITION PROVIDE TESTIMONY AND PRODUCE DOCUENTS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT MODIFIES THE TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JYJUDGEPROTEM@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON YURASEK, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: SHEILA PHAM, CSR #415-274-9977, SFDEPO@VERITEXT.COM, REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Megal York To Attend Deposition Provide Testimony And Produce Docuents And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Kent Rose, Esq. 415-332-6000 for Plaintiff.
David Harris, Esq. 415-806-9143 of Santan & Verra for Defendants Lum & Lee.
William McLaughlin II, Esq. 916-564-9710 x47833 for Defendant Norman Charles Construction through Court Call.
Eric Young, Esq. 707-527-3637 of Young Law Office for Defendant.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #415-274-9977, sfdepo@veritext.com, Reported.

All parties stipuate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NORMAN CHARLES CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Megal York To Attend Deposition Provide Testimony And Produce Docuents And Monetary Sanctions.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling. Granted in Part and Denied in Part.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at jyjudgeprotem@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #415-274-9977, sfdepo@veritext.com, Reported. =(302/JPT)
